justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted the user's temporal requests, even when they changed multiple times.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the same two unavailable weekend slots, despite the user explicitly rejecting weekends multiple times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made an excessive number of redundant API calls, checking the same dates and times repeatedly, and also checked an extremely wide range of dates (7 months) in the final turn without confirmation.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was extremely frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any available slots for a phone meeting and its repeated offering of unavailable weekend slots.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent failed to recover effectively, continuously offering the same rejected weekend slots and eventually stating no availability for 7 months without offering a viable solution or escalation path.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to find any available slots for a pension phone call, despite extensive searching, and its repeated offering of weekend slots after the user explicitly rejected them, led to a highly frustrating and unproductive conversation for the user.
